The '''Healing Crystals of Fire''' were one of the greatest treasures of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Kept under tight security in one of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Healing Crystal room|meditation chamber]] and guarded by the [[Circle of Jedi Healers/Legends|Circle of Jedi Healers]], the stones were used to help heal serious wounds in the [[Halls of Healing]]. Named for the eternal flames that burned inside each crystal, the crystals were said to be able to bring an individual back from the brink of [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="TJP" /> It was rumored that the Healing Crystals originated on the planet [[Aurea]], a gift from the [[Soulworks Collective Advisory Council]] to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. During the age of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] the Advisory Council denounced the rumors.<ref name="SoF" />

During a [[Incident at the Jedi Temple|series of robberies]], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] attempted to steal these precious stones. He took the stolen stones to the Temple's fusion furnace in an attempt to destroy the Temple, yet [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] figured out Xanatos' plans and recovered the crystals in time.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]''</ref> Returned to their rightful place in the Temple, the crystals were lost during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].<ref name="TJP" />
